name: conversations
description: Native macOS WhatsApp client with a reThink CRM sidebar

scripts.build:main: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && mkdir -p dist/electron/db && cp electron/db/schema.sql dist/electron/db/schema.sql
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && CONV_DEV=1 CONV_DEVTOOLS=1 electron .
scripts.release: npm run dist && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") release/*.dmg release/*.zip --title "v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" --notes "Auto-update release"
